description: A seafood-focused grilled salmon prepared to highlight delicate texture, freshness, and seasoning balance.
preparation_steps: Cook or dress it with controlled seasoning
Plate with garnish and serve promptly

health_advice.benefits: Can provide quality protein and useful nutrients while still feeling relatively light.
health_advice.risks: Frying, heavy sauces, or freshness issues can affect both healthfulness and food safety.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Prioritize fresh seafood, moderate sauces, and balanced side dishes when possible.

dietary_notes.note: Sauces, batters, or sides can alter the gluten and dairy profile
